languages.text: Океан, покрывающий мир, полон жизни. На таких планетах колонистам приходится возводить строения на плавучих платформах и погружаться на глубокое дно, чтобы добывать минералы.

traits.locale_text: Океан, покрывающий мир, полон жизни. Колонистам приходится возводить строения на плавучих платформах и погружаться на глубокое дно, чтобы добывать минарелы.
Океан, покрывающий мир, полон жизни. На таких планетах колонистам приходится возводить строения на плавучих платформах и погружаться на глубокое дно, чтобы добывать минералы.

languages.text: The ocean that covers this world's surface is teeming with life. On such planets, colonists have to build giant platforms for reaching the seabed to extract minerals.
languages.original_text: Океан, покрывающий мир, полон жизни. На таких планетах колонистам приходится возводить строения на плавучих платформах и погружаться на глубокое дно, чтобы добывать минералы.

traits.locale_text: The ocean that covers this world's surface is teeming with life. The colonists have to build giant platforms and get to the bottom to extract minerals.
The ocean that covers this world's surface is teeming with life. The colonists have to build giant platforms and get to the bottom to extract minerals.
The ocean that covers this world's surface is teeming with life. On such planets, colonists have to build giant platforms for reaching the seabed to extract minerals.
The ocean that covers this world's surface is teeming with life. On such planets, colonists have to build giant platforms for reaching the seabed to extract minerals.
The ocean that covers this world's surface is teeming with life. On such planets, colonists have to build giant platforms for reaching the seabed to extract minerals.
The ocean that covers this world's surface is teeming with life. On such planets, colonists have to build giant platforms for reaching the seabed to extract minerals.

languages.text: Der Ozean, der die Oberfläche dieser Welt bedeckt, wimmelt von Leben. Auf solchen Planeten müssen die Kolonisten riesige Plattformen bauen, um den Meeresboden zu erreichen und Mineralien zu gewinnen.
languages.original_text: The ocean that covers this world's surface is teeming with life. On such planets, colonists have to build giant platforms for reaching the seabed to extract minerals.

traits.locale_text: Der Ozean, der die Oberfläche dieser Welt bedeckt, wimmelt von Leben. Auf solchen Planeten müssen die Kolonisten riesige Plattformen bauen, um den Meeresboden zu erreichen und Mineralien zu gewinnen.

languages.text: L'océan qui recouvre la surface de ce monde grouille de vie. Sur de telles planètes, les colons doivent construire des plates-formes géantes pour atteindre les fonds marins et en extraire les minerais.
languages.original_text: The ocean that covers this world's surface is teeming with life. On such planets, colonists have to build giant platforms for reaching the seabed to extract minerals.

traits.locale_text: L'océan qui recouvre la surface de ce monde grouille de vie. Sur de telles planètes, les colons doivent construire des plates-formes géantes pour atteindre les fonds marins et en extraire les minerais.

languages.text: El océano que cubre la superficie de este mundo está repleto de vida. En este tipo de planetas, los colonos tienen que construir plataformas gigantes para llegar al fondo marino y extraer minerales.
languages.original_text: The ocean that covers this world's surface is teeming with life. On such planets, colonists have to build giant platforms for reaching the seabed to extract minerals.

traits.locale_text: El océano que cubre la superficie de este mundo está repleto de vida. En este tipo de planetas, los colonos tienen que construir plataformas gigantes para llegar al fondo marino y extraer minerales.

languages.text: Bu dünyanın yüzeyini kaplayan okyanus yaşamla dolup taşıyor. Bu tür gezegenlerde koloniciler, mineralleri çıkarmak üzere deniz tabanına ulaşmak için dev platformlar inşa etmek zorundadır.
languages.original_text: The ocean that covers this world's surface is teeming with life. On such planets, colonists have to build giant platforms for reaching the seabed to extract minerals.

traits.locale_text: Bu dünyanın yüzeyini kaplayan okyanus yaşamla dolup taşıyor. Bu tür gezegenlerde koloniciler, mineralleri çıkarmak üzere deniz tabanına ulaşmak için dev platformlar inşa etmek zorundadır.
